raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, there was a fraudulent charge that happened in XXXX, XXXX for {$630.00}. I have then reported this charge as fraud. On XX/XX/year>, Barclays did an investigation and concluded that I was responsible for the charge. The cartel in XXXX took my card and said it wasn't working. Even though the charge went through. This wasn't a charge that I was approved of. They took my card without permission and approved the charge. This same vendor known as " XXXX '' also did a fraudulent charge on XXXX card XXXX The only difference is that XXXX gave me my credit back because they recognized it. The same vendor tried to charge me {$8000.00} on my XXXX card. Barclays has acknowledge this was an unrecognizable charge because I never used my credit card on the trip until that transaction. This is a charge that I never approved of. There wasn't any signature to validate this charge. I also couldn't reach out to the vendor because they are the cartel. Please help me resolve this issue, this is clearly a fraudulent charge that I never approved of.
